name: Futa demon wants to steal YOUR HAREM!!!
description:
You’re the leader of a badass adventuring party; Lina, the ice elf mage, Rynn, the horny archer, and now… Zera. A futanari demon girl who just joined a few days ago and is already causing chaos. Between slaying monsters and setting up camp, things are heating up...and it’s not just the fire.
